title: Parastranthus flavus
taxonomy: Parastranthus flavus is a species of flowering plant in the family Portulacaceae. The plant belongs to the genus Parastranthus. It is a succulent plant native to the Andes mountains in South America. The classification of Parastranthus flavus is further categorized under the order Caryophyllales. The plant's classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other species.
